title: Face Detection
description: Per-frame face detection using MediaPipe BlazeFace (Apache-2.0).
Emits axis-aligned bounding boxes and (optionally) 6 coarse alignment-grade
keypoints per face: right_eye, left_eye, nose_tip, mouth_center, right_ear_tragion,
Use as a fast face-presence gate or for face-aware framing. For object detection on arbitrary
classes use the Object Detection node.
Runtime: MediaPipe Tasks Python runs on CPU/XNNPACK regardless of the declared device
(GPU delegate is Linux-only and not enabled here).

input.description: AVI image stream to run face detection on.

output.description: Annotated image as raw stream - pipe to any node accepting image input.
JSON array of face detections: [{label: 'face', score, box, centroid, landmarks?}].

face_detection.threshold.title: Confidence threshold
face_detection.threshold.description: Minimum detection confidence (0.0-1.0). Default 0.5 - higher than object detect to suppress false faces on textured backgrounds.

face_detection.emit_landmarks.title: Emit 6 alignment keypoints
face_detection.emit_landmarks.description: Include coarse 6-point keypoints per face (eyes, nose, mouth, ear tragions) for face-aware framing and alignment.

cases.name: Detect a face in a portrait photo
Detect a face in a portrait photo
